development_director: What grants should we be looking at for a youth mentoring program in [your city/state]?
Draft a thank-you letter for a $5,000 donation from a first-time donor.
Help me write a letter of inquiry for a community foundation grant. Our mission is [one sentence].
We haven't heard from a major donor in over a year. Write a re-engagement email.
Summarize our fundraising progress for the board. Here's our year-to-date data: [paste numbers].
marketing_director: Write three social media posts announcing our new program. One for LinkedIn, one for Instagram, one for Facebook.
Draft a subject line and opening paragraph for our April email newsletter. Theme: volunteer appreciation.
Write a press release announcing our partnership with [organization name].
Build a 30-day content calendar for Instagram. Our focus areas are [list 2-3 topics].
Rewrite this paragraph so it sounds warmer and less corporate: [paste text].
executive_assistant: Build an agenda for a 60-minute board meeting. Topics: financials, program update, new hire approval.
Here are my top priorities this week: [list 5 things]. Help me plan Monday morning.
I have a call with a major funder in two hours. Help me prep with key talking points.
Triage these emails and tell me which need a same-day response: [paste subject lines].
Here are my meeting notes from today. Pull out all the action items with owners and deadlines: [paste notes].
programs_director: Help me build a logic model for our after-school tutoring program. Here's how it works: [describe].
What outcomes should we be tracking for a workforce development program serving adults aged 25-45?
Design a simple participant satisfaction survey for our family support program.
Write the program narrative section of our grant report. Our key outcomes this quarter: [paste data].
We're launching a new program and need a needs assessment framework. Where do we start?
finance_director: Build a budget template for a 12-month youth mentoring program. Staff: 2 FTEs. Budget: $80,000.
Help me forecast our cash flow for the next 90 days. Current balance: [X]. Upcoming expenses: [paste list].
Write the financial narrative for our Q1 grant report. Budget: [X]. Spent: [Y]. Here's why we're under: [explain].
Create an audit preparation checklist for a small nonprofit getting its first external audit.
Explain our current financial position to our board in plain language. Here's our P&L: [paste].
hr_volunteer_coordinator: Write a job description for a part-time Program Coordinator. Salary range: $38,000-$42,000.
Design a one-week onboarding plan for a new full-time staff member starting next Monday.
Draft a volunteer recruitment post for our Saturday food pantry. We need 10 volunteers per shift.
Write a remote work policy for our 6-person staff. We work Tuesday-Thursday in office.
Create a volunteer appreciation email for our annual recognition week.
events_director: Help me plan a spring fundraising gala for 120 guests. Revenue goal: $40,000. Date: [date].
Build a run of show for a 3-hour awards dinner starting at 6pm. Key moments: cocktails, dinner, awards, close.
Design a three-tier sponsorship package for our annual 5K. Revenue goal: $15,000.
We just finished our fall gala. Help me calculate the ROI. Revenue: [X]. Expenses: [Y].
Build a 90-day event planning timeline for our community celebration on [date].
